title: Lifestyle Audit
description: Rate yourself on 8 key lifestyle areas that influence mood, then identify one small, achievable change for each area you want to improve.
instructions: For each area, rate your current level from 0 (very poor) to 10 (excellent). Then write one small, specific change you could make this week. Focus on progress, not perfection — even small improvements add up.

items.label: One small change for nutrition
items.placeholder: e.g., Add one serving of vegetables to lunch

items.label: Whole food vs. processed food balance
One small change for food quality
items.placeholder: e.g., Swap one processed snack for a piece of fruit

items.label: One small change for sleep quantity
items.placeholder: e.g., Go to bed 15 minutes earlier on weeknights

items.label: One small change for sleep quality
items.placeholder: e.g., No phone in bed for 30 minutes before sleep

items.label: One small change for screen time
items.placeholder: e.g., Put phone on charger outside the bedroom by 10 PM

items.label: One small change for physical activity
items.placeholder: e.g., Take a 10-minute walk after lunch

items.label: One small change for outdoor time
items.placeholder: e.g., Eat one meal outside this week

items.label: One small change for social connection
items.placeholder: e.g., Text or call one friend this week

disclaimer: This audit is for educational self-reflection. It is not a diagnostic tool. If you are struggling with depression, please consult a healthcare provider.
